steps.title: Spot the contrast clue
steps.content: The passage says blue holes and cenotes differ in size, water composition, and location type.

steps.title: Apply the clue to the choices
steps.content:
Because they differ, they are not seen as similar; analogous means similar, so it fits the blank.
The other choices either mean different, explainable, or mismatched, which do not match the contrast.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
